about.title: The Way of Go in the Age of Algorithms
about.introTitle: Prologue: A Sanctuary in the Noise
about.introText1: We live in an era of digital cacophony. Most Go applications today are cluttered with ads and complex features that distract from the simple beauty of the game.
about.introText2: go-daily was built as a sanctuary. By stripping away the noise, we return the focus to the 19x19 grid—a place for true immersion and quiet reflection. Here, there is only you, the shapes, and the fleeting tranquility of placing a stone.
about.section1Text1: The beauty of Go lies not in the final score, but in the quality of thought behind every move.
about.section1Text2: Modern AI is formidable, but its strength can be a double-edged sword. When an algorithm hands you the 'correct' move instantly, it robs you of the struggle that defines true improvement. Knowledge directly handed down is fragile.
about.section1Text3: Insights earned through the 'pain' of deep calculation are the only ones that truly belong to you. Our AI coach is not an oracle of answers, but a Socratic guide—reviewing with you, prompting you when you hesitate, and ultimately empowering your own intuition.
about.section2Text1: On March 13, 2016, the world witnessed a moment of pure human transcendence.
about.section2Text2: Against the cold, calculating logic of AlphaGo, Lee Sedol played the 'Divine Move'—a wedge at L11. It was a move the algorithm had deemed a 1-in-10,000 statistical anomaly.
about.section2Text3: In that moment, Lee Sedol proved that even on a finite board, there exists a beauty and spirit that cannot be reduced to binary code or probability.
about.section2Text4: go-daily carries this spirit. We encourage you to seek your own 'Divine Move'—not just the safest play, but the one that resonates with your own intuition and sparks joy in discovery.
about.section3Text1: Now that machines have surpassed us in skill, the meaning of Go has returned to its essence: a path for self-cultivation.
about.section3Text2: From Conquest to Contemplation: Go is no longer a battle to be won against an opponent, but a dialogue with oneself. It is a tool for Inner Peace and a mirror for honing focus and resilience.
about.section3Text3: Symbiosis: We do not compete with machines; we learn from their vastness to expand our own horizons. go-daily is a bridge between human intuition and artificial wisdom—a ladder to higher truths.
about.section4Text1: Hello, I'm Frank, the developer of go-daily.
about.section4Text2: I am a deep Go enthusiast myself, currently at Amateur 3-dan. As a fellow player, I know the frustration of the plateau; as a developer, I am exploring how technology can serve this ancient art.
about.section4Text3: In an age of speed, go-daily is an exercise in idealism. I hope it's a place where you can take five minutes out of a busy day to simply sit down, think deeply, and place one stone with intent.
about.section4Text4: The Way of Go is long, and we are all seekers. I hope this project accompanies you through the alternating seasons of black and white, to see a wider world.
about.footer: (C) 2026 Frank. Dedicated to the beauty of the game.

home.hint: Tap an empty intersection to place a stone
home.boardCoordinateHint: Coordinates use (x,y) with the top-left as (0,0). 19x19 puzzles may show only a local corner.
home.keyboardShortcuts: Shortcuts: Arrow keys move the cursor · Enter or Space places a stone · R resets · Esc clears the current move

result.coachEmpty: Ask anything — e.g. "Why is this the vital point?" or "What happens if White hanes?"
result.coachLimited: AI coach is available on approved coach-ready puzzles only.
result.coachGuestLocked: Sign in to use AI Coach and sync your progress across devices.
result.coachUsageBilling: {{today}} left today · {{month}} left this billing cycle
result.coachDeviceLimit: Free accounts work on one device at a time. Upgrade to Pro for multi-device sync and AI Coach everywhere.
result.coachDailyLimitReached: You've used today's AI Coach limit.
result.coachMonthlyLimitReached: You've used this month's AI Coach limit.
result.coachGuestDailyLimit: You've used today's free AI Coach sessions. Sign up for free to get 10 per day.
result.coachGuestMonthlyLimit: You've used this month's free AI Coach sessions. Sign up for free to get 30 per month.
result.boardCoordinateHint: The AI coach uses the same (x,y) coordinates as the page, with the top-left as (0,0).
result.keyboardShortcuts: Shortcuts: R retries · Left and right arrows step through the solution · Esc closes the current solution view

hero.subtitle: Experience the silent battle of the ancient game. Hone your skill with every stone, and feel the wisdom of millennia unfold.

boardShowcase.title: Move 78
boardShowcase.subtitle: The Divine Move
boardShowcase.description: In the fourth game of the historic match, Lee Sedol played the legendary "wedge" at L11 — a move so unexpected that it forced AlphaGo into a series of errors, leading to humanity's only victory in the series.

manifest.name: go-daily — Daily Go Puzzle
manifest.description: One Go puzzle a day with a Socratic AI coach.

home.title: go-daily — Daily Go Puzzle with AI Coach
